stories: US equities enter a catalyst-heavy week with momentum stretched (S&P: 11 wins in 12 weeks)
UK political shock: Starmer resigns; sterling/FTSE reaction signals “contained policy risk” (for now)
Japan duration pressure: 10Y JGB yield rises to ~2.675% (+3 bp)
China policy stays steady: PBOC holds key rate at 3.0%; yuan remains range-bound
Europe equities mixed: rotation beats broad risk-on (DAX firmer; CAC/FTSE softer/flat)
FISV insider “cluster buy”: two senior officers buy ~10k shares each in open market
